tier0.name: Local substrate
tier0.evidence: ADR-ACT-0111 complete. Database migrated. Fixture seeded. Platform-api substrate tests pass. Vitest frontend tests pass. Architecture gates pass.

tier1.name: Local vertical slice test substrate
tier1.evidence: ADR-ACT-0112 complete. platform-api HTTP server created. Vite proxy configured. Playwright E2E substrate (8 tests). make e2e-check target established.

tier2.name: Real identity substrate
tier2.terraformRequired: Keycloak realm, clients, scopes, mappers, roles

tier3.name: Cloud deployment substrate
tier3.blockedBy: cloud Terraform/OpenTofu modules not yet defined
tier3.terraformRequired: cloud networking, database, cache, storage, DNS, TLS, OIDC deploy role

mustNot: Create application tables (owned by app migrations)
Seed application fixture data (owned by seed scripts)
must: Provision durable infrastructure for the required tier
